description: Jelastic Cloud (Infomaniak datacenter, Switzerland) — clone-environment-based PROD safety, git-tag-revert DEV. Reference implementation; client code in plugins/shipwright-deploy/scripts/lib/jelastic_client.py.

required_env_vars.name: JELASTIC_TOKEN
required_env_vars.description: Jelastic Personal Access Token for API access (Infomaniak datacenter).

optional_env_vars.name: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN
optional_env_vars.description: Required only if the project uses Supabase migrations.

rollback.manual_procedure_reference: /shipwright-deploy --rollback (lists backup clones, prompts for confirmation, restores from selected clone)
